results.justification: Dynamic RoPE adjustments per-layer + base optimization is functionally adjacent; lacks closed-loop drift sensor but covers the core idea.
Analyzes lower bound on base for given context length; not a dynamic-correction mechanism.
Dynamic-YaRN inference-time scaling per sequence length is functionally similar to drift-rate-aware adjustment, though length not velocity is the signal.
LongRoPE2 per-dimension scaling discovered via search and applied dynamically — same goal (preserve attention quality with dynamic θ).
Outlier and quantization-aware RoPE rescaling is concerned with quantization, not decode-velocity compensation.
Direct twin: closed-loop hidden-state-drift sensor adjusts RoPE base per decode step — exactly FOVEA-DECODE.
Decode-velocity aware PE — functional equivalent of candidate.
